claims.summary: PI and compatibility regulator modes must remain mechanically distinguishable.
claims.disposition: Verified current mode separation and compatibility coverage.

claims.summary: Pressure gating may feel delayed even when the regulator is numerically stable.
claims.disposition: Preserved as felt friction; stability metrics do not close or contradict the report.

claims.summary: Regulator-mode traces should be compared for pressure, density, resonance, and viscosity mismatch.
claims.disposition: Routed to deterministic fixture replay using existing read-only evidence.

claims.summary: Same-tick pressure-gate behavior should be inspected for an avoidable mechanical delay.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded source-and-fixture observation without changing controller timing.

claims.summary: Live regulator dampening or hysteresis should be changed to reduce the delay.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 controller change requiring explicit operator approval; the current viscosity vector remains evidence-only.
